member.name: T:Polyglot.TextLayout.FontFitting.FontFitRequest
member.summary: Input for font size fitting. Supports two modes: block-rect (MaxWidth + MaxHeight) and line-width (LineWidths with optional MaxLineCount / MaxHeight / LineHeights).

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.FontFitting.FontFitRequest.Text
member.summary: Text to fit.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.FontFitting.FontFitRequest.StartFontSize
member.summary: Starting font size in points (typically from BlockTextStyle.FontSize).

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.FontFitting.FontFitRequest.MinFontSize
member.summary: Minimum font size to try before declaring truncation.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.FontFitting.FontFitRequest.MaxWidth
member.summary: Block rect mode: maximum width for all lines.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.FontFitting.FontFitRequest.MaxHeight
member.summary: Block rect mode: maximum total height for all lines.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.FontFitting.FontFitRequest.LineHeightMultiplier
member.summary: Line height multiplier applied to font size.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.FontFitting.FontFitRequest.LineWidths
member.summary: Line rect mode: per-line maximum widths.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.FontFitting.FontFitRequest.MaxLineCount
member.summary: Line rect mode: maximum number of visible lines. Defaults to LineWidths.Count.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.FontFitting.FontFitRequest.LineHeights
member.summary: Line rect mode: per-line heights (for font-size ceiling).

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.FontFitting.FontFitRequest.NormalizeWhitespace
member.summary: Whether to normalize whitespace during preparation.

member.name: T:Polyglot.TextLayout.FontFitting.FontFitResult
member.summary: Result of font size fitting.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.FontFitting.FontFitResult.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Result of font size fitting.

member.name: T:Polyglot.TextLayout.FontFitting.FontFitSolver
member.summary: Binary-search font size solver. Finds the largest font size in [MinFontSize, StartFontSize] such that the text fits the given constraints. ~6 iterations for 24pt→6pt at 0.25pt precision (vs 36 linear steps at 0.5pt).

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.FontFitting.FontFitSolver.Solve(Polyglot.TextLayout.FontFitting.FontFitRequest,Polyglot.TextLayout.ITextLayoutEngine,System.Func{System.Double,Polyglot.TextLayout.ITextMeasurer})
member.summary: Solves for the optimal font size.
member.param: Creates an for a given font size. Called once per binary-search iteration.

member.name: T:Polyglot.TextLayout.ITextLayoutEngine
member.summary: Two-phase text layout engine inspired by Pretext's prepare-then-layout architecture. The preparation phase segments and measures text. The layout phase uses pure arithmetic for line breaking — no measurement calls.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.ITextLayoutEngine.Prepare(Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.TextPrepareRequest,Polyglot.TextLayout.ITextMeasurer)
member.summary: Preparation phase: normalize, segment, measure, and cache text data. The result is reusable for multiple layout calls at the same font size.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.ITextLayoutEngine.Layout(Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph,System.Double)
member.summary: Count-only layout: returns line count and max width without allocating line strings. Fast path for font fitting.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.ITextLayoutEngine.LayoutWithLines(Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph,System.Double)
member.summary: Fixed-width layout: produces line strings and geometry.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.ITextLayoutEngine.Layout(Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Double})
member.summary: Variable-width count-only layout: returns line count without allocating line strings. Fast path for font fitting with per-line widths.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.ITextLayoutEngine.LayoutWithLines(Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Double})
member.summary: Variable-width layout: each line can have a different max width. If text exceeds the number of widths, continues using the last width.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.ITextLayoutEngine.WalkLineRanges(Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph,System.Double,System.Action{Polyglot.TextLayout.Layout.LayoutLineRange})
member.summary: Geometry-only walk: calls for each line without allocating strings. Returns total line count.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.ITextLayoutEngine.LayoutNextLine(Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph,Polyglot.TextLayout.Layout.LayoutCursor,System.Double)
member.summary: Incremental layout: lays out one line at a time starting from . Returns null when all text has been consumed. Used for MuPdf content stream generation where each line emits PDF operators.

member.name: T:Polyglot.TextLayout.ITextMeasurer
member.summary: Measures text advance widths in points at a specific font and size. Implementations are stateful with respect to font/size — create a new instance when font size changes (e.g., during font fitting iterations).

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.ITextMeasurer.MeasureSegment(System.String)
member.summary: Measures the advance width of a multi-character text segment.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.ITextMeasurer.MeasureGrapheme(System.String)
member.summary: Measures the advance width of a single grapheme cluster. Used for breaking long segments and CJK per-character layout.

member.name: T:Polyglot.TextLayout.Layout.LayoutCursor
member.summary: A position within a for incremental layout.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.Layout.LayoutCursor.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: A position within a for incremental layout.

member.name: F:Polyglot.TextLayout.Layout.LayoutCursor.Start
member.summary: Starting cursor at the beginning of text.

member.name: T:Polyglot.TextLayout.Layout.LayoutLine
member.summary: A laid-out line of text with content and geometry.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.Layout.LayoutLine.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Double,System.String)
member.summary: A laid-out line of text with content and geometry.

member.name: T:Polyglot.TextLayout.Layout.LayoutLineRange
member.summary: Geometry-only line range without string allocation. Used by for fast counting and width probing.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.Layout.LayoutLineRange.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Double)
member.summary: Geometry-only line range without string allocation. Used by for fast counting and width probing.

member.name: T:Polyglot.TextLayout.Layout.LayoutLinesResult
member.summary: Full layout result with line text and geometry.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.Layout.LayoutLinesResult.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Polyglot.TextLayout.Layout.LayoutLine},System.Double,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Full layout result with line text and geometry.

member.name: T:Polyglot.TextLayout.Layout.LayoutResult
member.summary: Count-only layout result — no line strings allocated. Fast path for font fitting.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.Layout.LayoutResult.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Double,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Count-only layout result — no line strings allocated. Fast path for font fitting.

member.name: T:Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph
member.summary: The output of the preparation phase: segmented, measured, and cached text data. All arrays are parallel with the same length (). Layout operations use these arrays without further measurement calls.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph.Segments
member.summary: Segment text values.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph.Widths
member.summary: Measured advance width of each segment in points.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph.Kinds
member.summary: Layout classification of each segment.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph.LineEndFitAdvances
member.summary: Advance width contribution when this segment is at the end of a line. For Space segments: 0 (trailing whitespace hangs past the margin). For SoftHyphen segments: (adds visible hyphen). For all others: equals [i]. Inspired by Pretext's lineEndFitAdvances.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph.GraphemeWidths
member.summary: Per-grapheme widths within each segment. Populated eagerly during Prepare() for segments with more than one grapheme cluster. Null for all other segment kinds (CjkGrapheme, Space, HardBreak, punctuation).

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph.GraphemePrefixSums
member.summary: Prefix sums of for binary-search line breaking of long segments. GraphemePrefixSums[i][k] = sum of first k+1 grapheme widths in segment i. Populated eagerly during Prepare() alongside . Null when is null for that segment.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph.Graphemes
member.summary: Grapheme strings for segments that have been grapheme-decomposed. Used to reconstruct text when a segment is broken mid-grapheme. Populated eagerly during Prepare() alongside . Null when is null for that segment.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph.IsProhibitedLineStart
member.summary: True when the segment's first character is prohibited from starting a line per Japanese kinsoku shori rules (JIS X 4051). Includes closing brackets, CJK periods/commas, small kana, prolonged sound mark, iteration marks.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph.IsProhibitedLineEnd
member.summary: True when the segment's last character is prohibited from ending a line per Japanese kinsoku shori rules. Includes opening brackets and CJK opening marks.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph.HardBreakIndices
member.summary: Indices of segments within the segments array. Empty when there are no hard breaks. Used for chunk-based fast-path optimization.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph.DiscretionaryHyphenWidth
member.summary: Width of a discretionary hyphen character, measured once during preparation. Used as value for segments. Zero when no soft-hyphens are present in the text.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph.IsSingleChunk
member.summary: True when there are no hard breaks — enables simplified layout path.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph.Count
member.summary: Number of segments.

member.name: T:Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.TextPrepareRequest
member.summary: Input for the text preparation phase.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.TextPrepareRequest.Text
member.summary: The text to prepare for layout.

member.name: P:Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.TextPrepareRequest.NormalizeWhitespace
member.summary: When true, whitespace is normalized (collapse runs, trim trailing before \n). Matches pdf2zh converter.py:488 behavior used in current WrapTextByWidth.

member.name: T:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.KinsokuTable
member.summary: Japanese line-breaking rules (kinsoku shori) per JIS X 4051 / CSS Text Level 3. Defines characters that cannot start or end a line in CJK typesetting.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.KinsokuTable.IsProhibitedLineStart(System.Char)
member.summary: Characters that must not appear at the start of a line. Includes closing brackets, CJK periods/commas, small kana, prolonged sound mark, iteration marks, and fullwidth terminal punctuation.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.KinsokuTable.IsProhibitedLineEnd(System.Char)
member.summary: Characters that must not appear at the end of a line. Includes opening brackets and CJK opening marks.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.KinsokuTable.IsLeftSticky(System.Char)
member.summary: Left-sticky punctuation that attaches to the preceding CJK character. These ASCII punctuation marks should not start a line when they follow CJK text.

member.name: T:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.ScriptClassifier
member.summary: Classifies characters by script family for segmentation and line-breaking decisions.

member.name: T:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.ScriptClassifier.CharCategory
member.summary: Layout-relevant classification for a single character.

member.name: F:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.ScriptClassifier.CharCategory.Cjk
member.summary: CJK ideograph, kana, hangul, or fullwidth form.

member.name: F:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.ScriptClassifier.CharCategory.Latin
member.summary: Latin script or any non-CJK / non-special character.

member.name: F:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.ScriptClassifier.CharCategory.Space
member.summary: Whitespace that allows a soft break (space, tab, CR).

member.name: F:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.ScriptClassifier.CharCategory.HardBreak
member.summary: Mandatory line terminator (LF).

member.name: F:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.ScriptClassifier.CharCategory.OpenPunctuation
member.summary: Opening bracket / quote that groups with the following segment.

member.name: F:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.ScriptClassifier.CharCategory.ClosePunctuation
member.summary: Closing bracket / quote / terminal punctuation that groups with the preceding segment.

member.name: F:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.ScriptClassifier.CharCategory.SoftHyphen
member.summary: Soft hyphen (U+00AD): hidden break opportunity.

member.name: F:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.ScriptClassifier.CharCategory.Other
member.summary: Anything that does not fit the other categories.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.ScriptClassifier.Classify(System.Char)
member.summary: Classifies a single character into a layout-relevant category.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.ScriptClassifier.IsCjk(System.Char)
member.summary: Returns true for CJK ideographs, kana, hangul, and fullwidth forms. Matches the ranges used by both MuPdfExportService.IsCjkCharacter and PdfExportService.IsCjkCharacter/TokenizeForWrapping.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.ScriptClassifier.IsOpenPunctuation(System.Char)
member.summary: Returns true for opening brackets/quotes that should group with the following segment.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.ScriptClassifier.IsClosePunctuation(System.Char)
member.summary: Returns true for closing brackets/quotes/terminal punctuation that should group with the preceding segment.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.ScriptClassifier.EnumerateGraphemes(System.String)
member.summary: Enumerates grapheme clusters in a string using StringInfo (UAX29).

member.name: T:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.SegmentKind
member.summary: Classifies a text segment for line-breaking decisions.

member.name: F:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.SegmentKind.Word
member.summary: Latin/Cyrillic/Greek word run, possibly with trailing punctuation.

member.name: F:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.SegmentKind.CjkGrapheme
member.summary: Single CJK character — breakable at any boundary.

member.name: F:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.SegmentKind.Space
member.summary: One or more spaces or tabs (collapsible whitespace).

member.name: F:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.SegmentKind.HardBreak
member.summary: Hard line break (\n).

member.name: F:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.SegmentKind.FormulaPlaceholder
member.summary: Atomic formula placeholder — not breakable internally.

member.name: F:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.SegmentKind.OpenPunctuation
member.summary: Opening punctuation that groups with the following segment: ( [ { etc.

member.name: F:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.SegmentKind.ClosePunctuation
member.summary: Closing punctuation that groups with the preceding segment: ) ] } . , ; : ! ? etc.

member.name: F:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.SegmentKind.SoftHyphen
member.summary: Soft hyphen (U+00AD) — zero width normally, visible hyphen at line break.

member.name: T:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.TextSegmenter
member.summary: Segments text into layout-aware tokens for line breaking. Produces parallel arrays of (segment string, kind) for efficient iteration.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.TextSegmenter.Segment(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Segments text into layout-aware tokens. Whitespace is normalized: consecutive spaces/tabs collapse to a single space. Hard breaks (\n) are preserved.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.TextSegmenter.ClassifyRune(System.Text.Rune,System.Char)
member.summary: Classifies a Rune, falling back to char-based classification for BMP characters. Handles supplementary CJK planes (Extension B+) via Rune.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.TextSegmenter.NormalizeWhitespace(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes whitespace: collapses consecutive spaces/tabs to a single space. Preserves \n as hard breaks. Trims trailing spaces before hard breaks.

member.name: T:Polyglot.TextLayout.TextLayoutEngine
member.summary: Core text layout engine. Greedy first-fit line breaking with: - Punctuation grouping (close-punct never starts a line, open-punct never ends a line) - Long-segment binary search on grapheme prefix sums - Space trimming at line start (matches pdf2zh converter.py:488)

member.name: F:Polyglot.TextLayout.TextLayoutEngine.Instance
member.summary: Singleton instance.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.TextLayoutEngine.LayoutNextLineCore(Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph,Polyglot.TextLayout.Layout.LayoutCursor,System.Double,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Core line-breaking algorithm. Greedy first-fit with punctuation grouping. - Close-punctuation never starts a line (grouped with preceding content, with overflow check) - Open-punctuation never ends a line (if it would be the last token, defer to next line) - Kinsoku line-start prohibition: CJK chars like small kana, prolonged sound marks, and iteration marks never start a line (carried to the preceding line) - Left-sticky punctuation: ASCII punct (. , ! ? etc.) after CJK sticks to preceding char - Trailing spaces trimmed from width calculation consistently

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.TextLayoutEngine.IsLeftStickyBreak(System.String,Polyglot.TextLayout.Segmentation.SegmentKind)
member.summary: Checks whether breaking before this segment would violate left-sticky rules. ASCII punctuation (. , ! ? : ; ) ] } % " …) should stick to preceding CJK content.

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.TextLayoutEngine.LayoutLineFromMidSegment(Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph,Polyglot.TextLayout.Layout.LayoutCursor,System.Double,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Resume layout from the middle of a segment (after a long-segment break).

member.name: M:Polyglot.TextLayout.TextLayoutEngine.BreakLongSegment(Polyglot.TextLayout.Preparation.PreparedParagraph,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Binary search on grapheme prefix sums to break a long segment.
